overview: Postify Academy is a complete EdTech SaaS admin panel for managing a course app — courses, students, content, payments, and more — all from one place.
features: App Sync with clickable Postify Course App card and full editable dashboard
Edit banners, courses, content, and upload PDFs/study materials from admin panel
Razorpay payment integration for receiving payments alongside Stripe
Withdrawal/payout system to transfer earnings to bank account
Complete course app management: video classes, PDF notes, lesson editor
Real-time backend sync between admin panel and course app
Bank account details storage for reusable payouts
Student progress tracking and enrollment analytics
